name: Cactus Pear Lemon-Ginger Penne
recipeIngredient: 2 medium bell peppers (green and red), stemmed, seeded and sliced
2 whole portabella mushrooms, stemmed, gills removed, sliced
2 pounds boneless grilled chicken breast, cut into ½-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to directions, drain and set aside.
2. Melt butter over medium heat in a large pot. Sauté ginger for 1 minute.
3. Add garlic, peppers, and mushrooms. Sauté for another minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add cream and simmer gently for 7-10 minutes (cream should boil slightly, become light brown, and reduce in volume). Stir in salt and lemon pepper.
5. Add cooked pasta and stir. Add diced chicken and prosciutto; stir and heat for 1 minute longer.
6. Serve sprinkled with grated Romano or Pecorino cheese. Makes 6-8 servings.
